definition: belonging to or associated with a male person previously mentioned

sentence.en: Despite his extensive experience with QA automation tools, the senior engineer found the intricate configurations of the new Appium update quite challenging to resolve.
sentence.uz: QA avtomatlashtirish vositalari bo'yicha katta tajribasiga qaramay, katta muhandis yangi Appium yangilanishining murakkab sozlamalarini hal qilishni ancha qiyin deb topdi.

definition: the place where one lives permanently, especially as a member of a family or household

sentence.en: Returning home to Qashqadaryo offers a much-needed respite from the relentless pace and pressure of urban metropolitan life.
sentence.uz: Qashqadaryodagi uyga qaytish shahar metropoliteni hayotining tinimsiz sur'ati va bosimidan juda zarur bo'lgan dam olish imkoniyatini beradi.

definition: a building for human habitation, especially one that is lived in by a family or small group of people

sentence.en: The environment inside the house must be carefully regulated to ensure that sensitive pets, such as budgerigar parrots, maintain healthy sleep hygiene.
sentence.uz: To'tiqushlar kabi nozik uy hayvonlarining sog'lom uyqu gigiyenasini saqlab qolishini ta'minlash uchun uy ichidagi muhit diqqat bilan tartibga solinishi kerak.

definition: in what way or manner; by what means

sentence.en: Understanding exactly how goroutines and mutexes operate under the hood is fundamentally essential for optimizing high-performance backend systems.
sentence.uz: Gorutinlar va mutekslarning ichki jarayonda qanday ishlashini aniq tushunish yuqori samarali backend tizimlarini optimallashtirish uchun mutlaqo zarurdir.

definition: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself

sentence.en: Although I initially struggled to comprehend the intricacies of game-tree complexity, analyzing grandmaster chess matches has profoundly deepened my tactical awareness.
sentence.uz: Garchi men dastlab o'yin-daraxti murakkabligi (game-tree complexity) nozikliklarini tushunishga qiynalgan bo'lsam-da, grossmeysterlarning shaxmat o'yinlarini tahlil qilish mening taktik tushunchamni chuqurlashtirdi.

definition: on the condition or supposition that; in the event that

sentence.en: If the continuous deployment process on Render is not meticulously configured, the e-learning platform could experience significant downtime during peak usage hours.
sentence.uz: Agar Render-da uzluksiz joylashtirish (deployment) jarayoni sinchkovlik bilan sozlanmagan bo'lsa, elektron ta'lim platformasi eng yuqori foydalanish soatlarida sezilarli uzilishlarga uchrashi mumkin.

definition: expressing the situation of something that is or appears to be enclosed or surrounded by something else

sentence.en: Pursuing a rigorous academic degree in economics requires a substantial commitment to empirical research and complex statistical analysis.
sentence.uz: Iqtisodiyot sohasida qat'iy ilmiy darajaga erishish empirik tadqiqotlar va murakkab statistik tahlillarga jiddiy yondashishni talab qiladi.

definition: expressing movement or action with the result that someone or something becomes enclosed or surrounded by something else

sentence.en: Integrating a seamless barcode scanning functionality into the new product management system necessitated a comprehensive overhaul of the existing database schema.
sentence.uz: Yangi mahsulotlarni boshqarish tizimiga uzluksiz shtrix-kodni skanerlash xususiyatini integratsiya qilish mavjud ma'lumotlar bazasi sxemasini har tomonlama qayta ishlashni talab qildi.

definition: third person singular present of be

sentence.en: Implementing a scalable and efficient architectural pattern with NestJS is arguably one of the most critical steps in modern software engineering.
sentence.uz: NestJS yordamida kengaytiriladigan va samarali arxitektura modelini joriy qilish zamonaviy dasturiy injiniringdagi eng muhim qadamlardan biri hisoblanadi (-dir).

definition: used to refer to a thing previously mentioned or easily identified

sentence.en: While the initial learning curve for advanced algorithms is steep, mastering it inevitably leads to writing significantly more optimal code.
sentence.uz: Ilg'or algoritmlarni o'rganishning dastlabki bosqichi qiyin bo'lsa-da, uni o'zlashtirish oxir-oqibat sezilarli darajada maqbulroq kod yozishga olib keladi.

definition: belonging to or associated with a thing previously mentioned or easily identified

sentence.en: The Vue 3 framework, universally renowned for its intuitive reactivity system, allows developers to build highly interactive user interfaces efficiently.
sentence.uz: O'zining intuitiv reaktivlik tizimi bilan butun dunyoda tanilgan Vue 3 freymvorki dasturchilarga yuqori interaktiv foydalanuvchi interfeyslarini samarali yaratishga imkon beradi.

definition: exactly; very recently; simply

sentence.en: Resolving the persistent DNS propagation issues was not just a technical formality, but a crucial milestone for securely launching the developer portfolio domain.
sentence.uz: Doimiy DNS tarqalish muammolarini hal qilish shunchaki texnik rasmiyatchilik emas, balki dasturchi portfelining domenini xavfsiz ishga tushirish uchun muhim bosqich edi.

definition: be aware of through observation, inquiry, or information

sentence.en: Candidates aiming for a superior band score in standardized proficiency tests must know how to seamlessly deploy advanced lexical resources.
sentence.uz: Standartlashtirilgan malaka testlarida yuqori ball olishni ko'zlagan nomzodlar ilg'or leksik resurslardan qanday qilib muammosiz foydalanishni bilishlari shart.

definition: of considerable or relatively great size, extent, or capacity

sentence.en: Managing a large cluster of concurrent processes effectively demands a profound comprehension of memory allocation and thread synchronization.
sentence.uz: Katta hajmdagi parallel jarayonlar klasterini samarali boshqarish xotira taqsimoti va iplar sinxronizatsiyasini chuqur tushunishni talab qiladi.

definition: coming after all others in time or order; final

sentence.en: During the last quarter of the financial year, the startup pivoted its core strategy to aggressively target the emerging mobile automation market.
sentence.uz: Moliya yilining oxirgi choragida startap rivojlanayotgan mobil avtomatlashtirish bozorini agressiv ravishda egallash uchun o'zining asosiy strategiyasini o'zgartirdi.

definition: on, towards, or relating to the side of a human body or of a thing that is to the west when the person or thing is facing north

sentence.en: The abrupt departure of the lead architect left the engineering team scrambling to decode the undocumented microservices infrastructure.
sentence.uz: Bosh arxitektorning to'satdan ketishi muhandislar jamoasini hujjatlashtirilmagan mikroservislar infratuzilmasini parolini ochish uchun sarosimaga tushib qoldirdi (ketdi).

definition: having the same characteristics or qualities as; similar to

sentence.en: Navigating a complex enterprise codebase is often like attempting to solve a multifaceted puzzle without having the reference picture.
sentence.uz: Murakkab korporativ kodlar bazasini o'rganish ko'pincha asosiy rasmga ega bo'lmagan holda ko'p qirrali boshqotirmani echishga o'xshaydi (kabi).

definition: a long, narrow mark or band

sentence.en: The fine line between constructive feedback and demoralizing criticism is something that effective technical leaders must carefully balance.
sentence.uz: Konstruktiv fikr-mulohaza va ruhiyatni tushiruvchi tanqid o'rtasidagi nozik chiziq shunday narsaki, samarali texnik rahbarlar uni ehtiyotkorlik bilan muvozanatlashi kerak.

definition: small in size, amount, or degree

sentence.en: There is currently very little empirical evidence to definitively prove that remote work diminishes overall team productivity in the tech sector.
sentence.uz: Hozirgi vaqtda masofaviy ishlash texnologiya sohasida jamoaning umumiy unumdorligini pasaytirishini qat'iy isbotlash uchun juda kam (kichik) empirik dalillar mavjud.

definition: measuring a great distance from end to end

sentence.en: The transition to a completely paperless educational institution is a long and arduous process requiring substantial infrastructural investments.
sentence.uz: Butunlay qog'ozsiz ta'lim muassasasiga o'tish katta infratuzilma sarmoyalarini talab qiladigan uzun va mashaqqatli jarayondir.

definition: direct one's gaze toward someone or something or in a specified direction

sentence.en: Instead of relying on outdated methodologies, modern businesses must look towards adopting cloud-native architectures to remain competitive.
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy korxonalar raqobatbardosh bo'lib qolish uchun eskirgan metodologiyalarga tayanish o'rniga, bulutli texnologiyalarga asoslangan arxitekturalarni joriy etishga qarashlari (e'tibor qaratishlari) kerak.

definition: past tense and past participle of make

sentence.en: The recent breakthroughs in machine learning have made it entirely possible to automate highly complex data analysis procedures.
sentence.uz: Mashinali o'qitishdagi so'nggi yutuqlar o'ta murakkab ma'lumotlarni tahlil qilish tartib-qoidalarini avtomatlashtirishni to'la imkoniyatli qildi.

definition: form (something) by putting parts together or combining substances; construct; create

sentence.en: To make a compelling argument in an academic essay, one must seamlessly synthesize multiple sources of peer-reviewed research.
sentence.uz: Akademik esseda ishonchli dalil keltirish (qilish) uchun, kishi ko'rib chiqilgan ko'plab ilmiy tadqiqot manbalarini uzluksiz sintez qilishi kerak.

definition: an adult male human being

sentence.en: The keynote speaker, a man of profound intellectual rigor, delivered a fascinating presentation on the future of decentralized finance.
sentence.uz: Chuqur intellektual qat'iylikka ega inson (erkak) bo'lgan asosiy ma'ruzachi markazlashtirilmagan moliyaning kelajagi haqida qiziqarli taqdimot qildi.

definition: a large number of

sentence.en: While implementing microservices offers scalability, it simultaneously introduces many unforeseeable challenges regarding inter-service communication.
sentence.uz: Mikroservislarni joriy qilish miqyosiylikni taqdim etsa-da, u bir vaqtning o'zida xizmatlararo aloqa bo'yicha ko'plab kutilmagan qiyinchiliklarni keltirib chiqaradi.

definition: expressing possibility

sentence.en: Fluctuations in the global cryptocurrency market may inherently affect the funding avenues available for emerging technological startups.
sentence.uz: Global kriptovalyuta bozoridagi tebranishlar yangi paydo bo'layotgan texnologik startaplar uchun mavjud bo'lgan moliyalashtirish yo'llariga tabiiy ravishda ta'sir qilishi mumkin.

definition: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself as the object of a verb or preposition

sentence.en: Reviewing system logs generated by ADB tools frequently helps me identify and troubleshoot elusive mobile application bugs with greater precision.
sentence.uz: ADB vositalari tomonidan yaratilgan tizim jurnallarini ko'rib chiqish menga tez-tez mobil ilovalardagi yashirin xatolarni aniqlash va ularni katta aniqlik bilan bartaraf etishga yordam beradi.

definition: plural form of man

sentence.en: Throughout history, visionary men and women have relentlessly pushed the boundaries of what is considered scientifically feasible.
sentence.uz: Tarix davomida kelajakni ko'ra oladigan erkaklar va ayollar ilmiy jihatdan amalga oshirish mumkin deb hisoblangan narsalar chegarasini tinimsiz ravishda kengaytirishgan.

definition: expressing a possibility based on a condition not fulfilled

sentence.en: Had the developers properly insulated the deployment pipeline, the catastrophic data leak might have been entirely prevented.
sentence.uz: Agar dasturchilar joylashtirish (deployment) quvurini to'g'ri izolyatsiya qilganlarida edi, fojiali ma'lumotlar sizib chiqishi butunlay oldini olingan bo'lishi ehtimoli bor edi.

definition: a greater or additional amount or degree

sentence.en: In modern backend development, writing readable and maintainable code is often more valuable than achieving negligible performance micro-optimizations.
sentence.uz: Zamonaviy backend dasturlashda o'qilishi oson va qo'llab-quvvatlanadigan kod yozish ko'pincha sezilmas ishlash mikro-optimallashtirishlariga erishishdan ko'ra qimmatliroqdir.
